description: CompositionYellow and white printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar with a split neck that has a mock chest placket, short sleeves, lace detailing with stone embellishments around the collar, placket and cuffs, yellow tape detailing above the hem and split side seamsFitRegularWash careWash cold using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsThis elegant kurta from vishudh speaks volumes of your class and exudes femininity with its timeless design and cuts. The traditional print is sure to make this a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with leggings or skinny jeans.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'7", chest 33" and waist 25"
